meaning: Retail Price Index,零售物价指数
examples: Therefore the new employment-based recession probability index (RPI) is 0.060 (or 6.0%).
Headline RPI, which includes mortgage payments, is often used as a basis in pay negotiations.
This gauge of inflation is of particular interest to workers as many pay deals are linked to RPI.
The CPI measure of inflation has generally risen by 0.7% a year less than RPI.
His RPI All-Stars went 0-5 in the tournament while his Pomeroy darlings went 5-5.
